extractedFields.location: 1800 W 6th Street & Lamar Blvd, Austin, TX 78703
extractedFields.description: Insured vehicle was traveling westbound on W 6th Street when a red sedan (other vehicle) ran a red light at the Lamar Blvd intersection and struck the insured vehicle on the driver-side front quarter panel. Airbags deployed. No injuries reported. Both vehicles were drivable. Police arrived on scene and filed report APD-2024-038821.
